creator: mm@FreeBSD.org
text:
I have backported the very latest version of relayd that should address
these issues.

Could you please try the updated port and report if it solves the issue?
http://people.freebsd.org/~mm/ports/net-relayd-4.9.20110522.tar.gz

The updated port does not implement:
carp, routers, snmp
